name: B&G Auto Sales
description_short: B&G Auto Sales is a buy-here-pay-here used car dealership in Arizona offering in-house auto financing for buyers with good or bad credit across 4 locations.
description_long:
B&G Auto Sales is an Arizona-based buy-here-pay-here (BHPH) used car dealership operating under parent entity Desert Finance LLC. With four physical locations — West Phoenix, Tucson, Mesa, and Flagstaff — B&G targets Arizona drivers who may struggle to obtain traditional auto financing. The company positions itself as an accessible option, offering quick online pre-approval and in-store financing consultations at each dealership.

B&G's core product is used vehicle sales combined with in-house financing arranged at the point of sale. Their inventory, as shown on the website, includes used cars, crossovers, and SUVs from brands such as Jeep, Kia, and Chevrolet, with prices ranging from roughly $15,000 to $22,000. Financing terms disclosed in the site's fine print reflect a 44-month loan term at 26.99% APR with a minimum 6% down payment, subject to credit approval. Additional services include vehicle trade-ins — accepted even if the customer doesn't purchase from B&G — and a self-serve online payment portal for existing borrowers.

B&G differentiates itself within the BHPH segment by including a 3-year / 36,000-mile limited warranty on every vehicle sold, a meaningful commitment compared to many independent BHPH operators. Each vehicle is professionally inspected and repaired before sale. Their geographic footprint across four Arizona markets gives them broader reach than most single-location BHPH dealers, and the pre-approval form is designed to take only seconds to complete.

Buyers should weigh the financing terms carefully. A 26.99% APR over 44 months represents a very high cost of credit — typical of the BHPH segment but far above rates available through banks or credit unions. B&G is not a general-purpose lender; all financing is tied exclusively to vehicles from their own inventory. Shoppers who qualify for any conventional auto loan will pay substantially less in total interest. That said, for Arizona drivers with seriously damaged credit who need reliable transportation and a warranty, B&G offers a structured, multi-location path to vehicle ownership.
pros: In-house financing available for all credit situations, explicitly including bad credit
3-year / 36,000-mile limited warranty included on every vehicle sold — uncommon in the BHPH market
Four Arizona locations (West Phoenix, Tucson, Mesa, Flagstaff) with in-person service at each
Professional vehicle inspection and repair performed before each sale
Trade-in accepted even if customer does not purchase a vehicle from B&G
Online pre-approval application described as a short, quick form
Online payment portal available for existing customers to make loan payments
cons: 26.99% APR disclosed in fine print is extremely high — far above average auto loan rates from banks or credit unions
Financing is exclusively tied to vehicles purchased from B&G's own inventory, not a standalone loan option
44-month term at 26.99% generates significant total interest cost above sticker price
Used inventory limited to vehicles in the roughly $15,000–$22,000 price range at time of review
All financing issued through Desert Finance LLC — not an independent or federally chartered lender
best_for: Arizona drivers with bad or no credit who cannot qualify for conventional auto financing
Buyers who want an all-in-one vehicle purchase and financing experience at a single location
Consumers in the Phoenix, Tucson, Mesa, or Flagstaff areas who need a warranted used vehicle
Drivers who need a vehicle and have been turned down elsewhere but can manage a down payment
diagnosis: B&G Auto Sales is best suited for Arizona drivers with damaged or no credit who need a vehicle and have been turned down by traditional lenders — the in-house financing and multi-location presence make access easy. The 26.99% APR disclosed in fine print makes this one of the most expensive financing arrangements a consumer can enter, so anyone who qualifies for a bank or credit union auto loan should exhaust those options first.
services: Used car sales (sedans, SUVs, crossovers — Jeep, Kia, Chevrolet and others)
Bad credit and subprime auto financing
Scheduled test drives at four Arizona locations
Phone and email sales support (480-707-9008 / sales@bg-autos.com)
